name: XMAX Starry 4 Ceramic Filter
summary: Maintain peak performance with the XMax Starry 4 Ceramic Filter —a precision replacement component for the XMax Starry 4 Vaporiser.
description: Maintain peak performance with the XMax Starry 4 Ceramic Filter —a precision replacement component for the XMax Starry 4 Vaporiser. Designed as part of the airflow system, this ceramic filter supports clean, consistent vapour production. Engineered for efficient vapour filtration, this ceramic filter helps refine airflow for smoother, cleaner draws. It enhances overall session quality by maintaining a balanced and consistent vapour path. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
